users.getUser: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email=? OR user_id=?
users.registerUser: INSERT INTO users(username, email, password, image_url, bio) VALUES(?,?,?,?,?)
users.getUsersPosts: SELECT p.*, u.username,u.image_url, COUNT(DISTINCT l.like_id) AS like_count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.comment_id) AS comment_count FROM   posts p LEFT JOIN   likes l ON p.post_id = l.post_id LEFT JOIN   comments c ON p.post_id = c.post_id JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id  WHERE   p.user_id = ? GROUP BY p.post_id;
users.tempRemove: DELETE FROM tempusers WHERE email = ? AND otp = ?;
users.changePass: UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE email = ?;

posts.getPosts: SELECT p.*, u.username,u.image_url, COUNT(DISTINCT l.like_id) AS like_count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.comment_id) AS comment_count FROM posts p INNER JOIN likes l ON p.post_id = l.post_id INNER JOIN comments c ON p.post_id = c.post_id INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id  GROUP BY p.post_id;
posts.getPostById: SELECT p.*, u.username,u.image_url, COUNT(DISTINCT l.like_id) AS like_count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.comment_id) AS comment_count FROM posts p INNER JOIN likes l ON p.post_id = l.post_id INNER JOIN comments c ON p.post_id = c.post_id INNER JOIN  users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id  WHERE p.post_id = ? GROUP BY p.post_id;
posts.getLikedPosts: SELECT p.*, u.username,u.image_url ,count(DISTINCT l.like_id) as like_count, count(DISTINCT c.comment_id) as comment_count  FROM likes l  JOIN posts p ON l.post_id = p.post_id  JOIN comments c ON l.post_id = c.post_id  JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id  WHERE l.user_id = ? GROUP BY p.post_id;
posts.uploadPost: INSERT INTO posts (content, image_url, user_id) VALUES (?,?,?);
posts.deletePost: DELETE FROM posts WHERE post_id = ? AND user_id = ?;
posts.updatePost: UPDATE posts SET content = ? WHERE post_id = ? AND user_id = ?;

likes.unlikePost: DELETE FROM likes WHERE user_id=? AND post_id=?

comments.getPostComments: SELECT c.*,u.username,u.image_url FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE post_id = ?
comments.uncommentPost: DELETE FROM comments WHERE user_id=? AND comment_id=?;
